title: ctenopteris melanopus
intro: Ctenopteris melanopus, also known as the Black Fern or Black Lady Fern, is a species of flowering plant in the fern family (Dryopteridaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ctenopteris melanopus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as having antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of Ctenopteris melanopus can be found in traditional medicine, often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
